name: Sewer Rat Swarm
conditionImmunities: Charmed, Frightened, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Prone, Restrained, Stunned

features.name: Keen Smell
features.text: The swarm has advantage on Perception checks relying on smell.

features.name: Swarm
features.text: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa. The swarm can move through openings large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.target: one target in the swarm's space
actions.damage: 7 (2d6) piercing damage, or 3 (1d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half its hit points or fewer.

summary.description: A writhing carpet of small rat bodies surging through the Blackflow tunnels. Dozens, maybe hundreds, pouring from side pipes in a coordinated mass. The swarm gets a free attack before combat begins, catching victims off guard as the rats brush against ankles before the full wave hits.

encounters.description: Found in the Blackflow tunnels as a random encounter.

groups.creatures: 1 sewer rat swarm surging from a side pipe
